Acrylates/Hydroxypropyl Epoxidized Soybean Oil Copolymer is the reaction product of Epoxidized Soybean Oil with Propylene Glycol that has been copolymerized with a mixture of two or more monomers consisting of acrylic acid, methacrylic acid, or one of their simple esters.

sh-Polypeptide-55 is a single chain synthetic human peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is synthesized to be identical to the human gene which codes for Amphiregulin used such or adapted to the production host. It contains a maximum of 252 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Hexapeptide-53 is the peptide consisting of alanine, glycine, leucine, proline and tyrosine synthesized to be identical to a portion of the peptide from Melittin found in bees and wasps.

Oligopeptide-91 rh-Oligopeptide-1 is a single chain synthetic fusion peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the gene from rh-Oligopeptide-1 and Oligopeptide-91. The fused peptide contains 74 amino acids and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.

sh-Polypeptide-72 is a single chain synthetic human peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is a synthesized copy of the human gene which codes for Erythropoietin used as such or adapted to the production host. It contains a maximum of 193 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.

sh-Polypeptide-81 is a single chain synthetic human peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is a synthesized copy of the human gene which codes for Heat Shock Protein 70 kDa 1A/1B used as such or adapted to the production host. It contains a maximum of 641 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.

It contains a maximum of 240 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.

sh-Polypeptide-74 is a single chain synthetic human peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is a synthesized copy of the human gene which codes for Neurotrophin-3 used as such or adapted to the production host. It contains a maximum of 257 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Sucrose Hexaisostearate is the hexaester of Sucrose and Isostearic Acid.

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: TETRAPEPTIDE-38 HEXAPEPTIDE-40 DECAPEPTIDE-27 OLIGOPEPTIDE-91 DIPEPTIDE-19 SH-POLYPEPTIDE-80
chemicalDescription: Tetrapeptide-38 Hexapeptide-40 Decapeptide-27 Oligopeptide-91 Dipeptide-19 sh-Polypeptide-80 is a single chain synthetic fusion peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the gene from Tetrapeptide-38, Hexapeptide-40, Decapeptide-27, Oligopeptide-91, Dipeptide-19, and sh-Polypeptide-80. The fused peptide contains 241 amino acids and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
inciName: TETRAPEPTIDE-38 HEXAPEPTIDE-40 DECAPEPTIDE-27 OLIGOPEPTIDE-91 DIPEPTIDE-19 SH-POLYPEPTIDE-80

chemicalDescription: sh-Heptapeptide-18 is a single chain human peptide produced synthetically to be identical to a portion of the protein, Dynorphin A, and contains 7 amino acids consisting of arginine, glycine, leucine, phenylalanine, and tyrosine
Trimethylbenzene is the organic compound

sh-Polypeptide-64 is a single chain synthetic human peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is a synthesized copy of the human gene which codes for Aquaporin-1 used as such or adapted to the production host. It contains a maximum of 269 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Endomyces/Apricot Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the fermentation of Prunus armeniaca (apricot) by the micororganism, Endomyces.

sh-Tetrapeptide-38 Trifluoroacetate is the trifluoroacetate salt of a single chain human peptide, produced synthetically to be identical to a portion of the protein, Stem Cell Factor which contains a maximum of 273 amino acids. sh-Tetrapeptide-38 Trifluoroacetate contains 4 amino acids consisting of aspartic acid, leucine, and lysine.
Micrococcus/Panax Ginseng Root Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of the roots of Panax ginseng by the microorganism, Micrococcus.
Nonapeptide-32 is the synthetic peptide consisting of alanine, cysteine, glycine, lysine, methionine, threonine, and tryptophan.
Secale Cereale (Rye) Adventitious Root Extract is the extract of the adventitious roots of Secale cereale (rye) grown in culture, Poaceae.
Caprylic/Capric Glycerides Polyglyceryl-10 Esters is the product obtained by the transesterification of Caprylic/Capric Glycerides with Polyglycerin-10
Eclipta Prostrata Leaf Oil is the volatile oil obtained from the leaves of Eclipta prostrata, Asteraceae.
Saccharomyces/Rice Bran/Germ Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of rice bran by the microorganism, Saccharomyces.

Silver is a metallic element.
(To identify the colourant meeting the requirements for labelling purposes in the EU, the INCI Name CI 77820 must be used)
